name: cortex
description: Self-learning intelligence layer that auto-extracts learnings, mines patterns, tracks decisions, and continuously optimizes your Claude Code workflow across all projects and sessions.

scope_task_threshold.description: Max tasks before scope creep warning (default: 5, range: 3-15)

repetitive_edit_threshold.description: Repeated edits before pattern alert (default: 5, range: 3-20)

auto_evolution.description: Enable auto-evolution from user feedback? (true/false, default: true)

default_output_style.description: Default output style: learning, terse, or verbose (default: learning)

health_alert_threshold.description: Session health score below which to alert (default: 40, range: 20-70)
